consultancies.descriptionOfNeeds: We have noticed a sudden drop in dissolved oxygen levels in our main rearing tanks. Need urgent advice on identifying the cause and corrective actions.
consultancies.questions: What are the best immediate steps to restore oxygen levels? Could this be linked to recent feed changes?
consultancies.consultancyResponses: Water Quality Improvement Plan, Recirculating System Troubleshooting
consultancies.summaryOfNeedsAi: Sudden oxygen drop in tanks, seeking cause and quick remediation.
consultancies.requestedServices: recxpats Site Search & Site Analysis, Feasibility Studies

consultancies.descriptionOfNeeds: Our fingerling survival rate has dropped below 70% this season. Looking for guidance on improving early-stage care and reducing mortality.
consultancies.questions: What are the most common causes of high mortality at this stage? Are there recommended protocols for feeding and tank cleaning?
consultancies.summaryOfNeedsAi: Low fingerling survival, seeking improved rearing protocols.

consultancies.descriptionOfNeeds: We are experiencing recurring algae blooms in our outdoor ponds, affecting water clarity and fish health. Advice needed on sustainable management strategies.
consultancies.questions: What are the safest ways to control algae without harming fish? Can you recommend any biological control methods?
consultancies.summaryOfNeedsAi: Recurring algae blooms, looking for eco-friendly control methods.

consultancies.descriptionOfNeeds: Several fish have developed lesions and erratic swimming behavior in one of our tanks. Requesting help to diagnose and contain the issue.
consultancies.questions: What initial steps should we take to prevent spread? Is a sample submission necessary for diagnosis?
consultancies.summaryOfNeedsAi: Fish showing lesions and abnormal behavior, need diagnosis and containment advice.

scheduledTasks.notes: Conduct photometer checks on nitrite / ammonia build-up.

marketplaceProducts.name: Fresh Nile Perch Fillet
marketplaceProducts.description: Lean, high-protein white fish fillet. Sourced directly from sustainably managed, biosecure wild-catch landing sites. Delicate flavor profile with superb flaking characteristics.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Pan-Seared Nile Perch with Warm Tomato-Caper Jam
customerReviews: Extremely fresh, delivered frozen in ozone boxes.
Great value for export grade fish.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Highly recommended for weight management and high-protein sports nutrition diets.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 94% Positive. Universal praise for extreme freshness, absence of muddy aftertaste, and premium vacuum containment.

marketplaceProducts.name: Crimson Red Tilapia (Whole)
marketplaceProducts.description: Plump, premium feed-converted pond-raised red tilapia. Harvested under rigorous biosecure containment. Outstanding sweet flavour with solid meat density.
customerReviews: Scale removal was painless because they arrived pre-gutted.
The flesh was exceptionally sweet and structured.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Optimal choice for authentic Ugandan whole fried tilapia preparation.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 91% Positive. Commended for size consistency, complete gut-cleanliness, and firm skin integrity.

marketplaceProducts.name: African Catfish (Clean Gutted)
marketplaceProducts.description: Grown using high-survival Clarias fingerlings. Exceptionally rich meat high in healthy omega fatty acids. Delivered post-gutted with protective ice lining.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Spicy Nile Catfish Coconut Curry Stew
customerReviews: Tasted amazing in catfish curry. No muddy taste at all.
Very rich oil content. Thick steaks.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Recommended for rich stews, slow smoking, and hot pepper mud fish culinary styles.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 88% Positive. Reviewers highlight superb rich texture and fast cooking rate.

marketplaceProducts.name: Biosecure Jumbo Tiger Prawns
marketplaceProducts.description: Gigantic Tiger Prawns flash-frozen within minutes of capture. Sustainably fed with elite fish farm formulations in state-of-the-art biosecure basins.
customerReviews: Worth every single shilling. Sweeter than ocean imports.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Perfect luxury option for catering special institutional Banquets or high-end dining.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 98% Positive. Celebrated for mammoth sizing, superb firm bite, and ease of de-veining.

marketplaceProducts.name: Mono-Crystalline Solar Panel (450W)
marketplaceProducts.description: High-grade solar paneled monocrystalline PV units designed to maximize ambient ray conversion. Robust anti-shatter finish, fully resistant to farm dust, salt moisture, and heavy downpours.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Solar Setup: Powering recxpats aeration grids and water pumps efficiently
customerReviews: Perfect clean energy solution. Zero cost offset after initial panel installations.
Durable aluminum construction handles high wind easily.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Highly recommended for running automatic oxygenation loops and remote guard units.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 96% Positive. Commended for steady performance even during partial cloud days.

marketplaceProducts.name: Lithium LiFePO4 Smart Battery (200Ah)
marketplaceProducts.description: Deep-cycle lithium iron phosphate battery featuring built-in smart battery protection (BMS). Excellent safety profiles with over 4,000 discharge cycles. Perfectly stores solar energy to power pond aerators overnight.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Wiring battery cells in series and parallel configurations securely for fish farm systems
customerReviews: Zero voltage drop throughout the night. Keeps camera networks and oxygenators online.
Extremely quick charging cycle under high UV index hours.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Excellent investment to safeguard against public utility load shedding.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 100% Positive. Rated extremely high for long life-expectancy and advanced protection features.

marketplaceProducts.name: Submersible DC Water Pump (400W)
marketplaceProducts.description: Unbelievably efficient DC submersible water pump. Plugs directly into 24V solar panels or matching battery cells without using expensive inverter units. Designed to pump up to 10,000 liters per hour.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Piping friction and pumping head pressure management for large recxpats ponds
unitOptions: 1x Submersible Pump + 30m Water Hose Pipe Kit
customerReviews: Pumps clean water into holding basins beautifully.
Quiet operations. Stainless steel impeller is great for longevity.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: Ideal for deep water intake wells and biosecure water flushing.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 93% Positive. Users praise simple wiring connections and massive volumetric output rate.

marketplaceProducts.name: Heavy-Duty Brushless Farm Drill Kit
marketplaceProducts.description: Cordless brushless impact drill kit with high-capacity rechargeable battery nodes. Ideal for installing pump brackets, solar framework, or aerator mounts.
marketplaceProducts.educationalContent: Installing and securing brackets for solar panels on farm roofs and ground mounts
customerReviews: Battery lasted the entire solar mount installation day.
marketplaceProducts.recommendation: High reliability tool for any farm technician who handles constant grid or equipment installations.
marketplaceProducts.sentimentSummary: 91% Positive. Lauded for high structural grip comfort, quick trigger response, and long battery life.

marketplaceReviews.reviewPhoto: 📸 Close up of thick ivory-white Perch Fillet
marketplaceReviews.reviewComment: Truly exceptional cut of Nile Perch. Freshness is immediately noticeable from the neat ivory hue. Zero residual lake slime aroma. Vacuum wrapping and ice blocks held perfectly.

marketplaceReviews.reviewSummaryAI: Massive sizing, fantastic sweet flavor, superior to imported goods.

liveChatTranscript.text: Hello, my Nile Perch order SF-2026-101 is scheduled for delivery today. Will it arrive strictly under ice?
Absolutely, Jalon! All our premium logistics dispatch trucks run under modern active aeration and deep dry ice sealing. We verify and record temperatures before and after exit.
Understood, please ensure the delivery courier rings the fish farm manager directly upon arrival.

marketplaceTickets.resolutionNotes: Pending confirmation from transit vehicle. Vehicle telemetry logs check out at stable 2.5°C.

marketplaceTickets.suggestedNextActionAI: Confirm delivery truck has dispatched cooler box with ice gel packs.

announcements.title: Fresh Harvest Logistics: cold room maintenance schedule
announcements.messageBody: Please note that Cold Room B will undergo preventative ozone system maintenance on Saturday 20th June, 21:00 UTC. All perishable stock (mainly fresh Nile Perch fillets and Crimson Red Tilapia whole packs) must be moved to Cold Room A to ensure uncompromised shelf life.
announcements.announcementSummaryAI: Ozone sanitisation maintenance scheduled for Saturday evening. Highly critical temperature protocol transition to prevent spoilage of 3.5 tons of fresh water listing.
announcements.suggestedFollowUpActionsAI: 1. Staff must complete physical transfer before 18:00 on Saturday; 2. Verification log must be signed off by cold chain supervisor.

announcements.title: New Biosecure Lobster Tail Unit Prices Activated
announcements.messageBody: New shipment of high-yield Giant Spiny Lobsters has arrived. The grade-AAA units are now set to Ush 55,000 per pack. Please update customer quotes and ensure traceability QR codes are correctly printed for checkout receipts.
announcements.announcementSummaryAI: New Giant Spiny Lobster SKU price update. Direct price point calibration to address high-margin catering accounts.
announcements.suggestedFollowUpActionsAI: Check all active cart transactions for lobster and ensure dynamic multi-unit pricing calculates correctly.

announcements.title: Mandatory Perishable Shelf-life Audit Guidelines
announcements.messageBody: All warehouse specialists are strictly required to double-check digital sensor expiry indicators every morning at 07:00. Any item within 48 hours of its sell-by date must be marked down by 25% or prioritized for the immediate cook-and-serve channels.
announcements.announcementSummaryAI: Daily 07:00 shelf-life checking protocol. Standardises markdown action at the 48-hour remaining window to maintain zero-waste policy.
announcements.suggestedFollowUpActionsAI: Ensure real-time sync with database API is maintained to avoid displaying stale inventory metrics.

directMessages.messageContent: Hi Albert, please ensure you double-check the temperature controls on Cold Space A. The Nile Perch fillets are ultra-sensitive export grade and require a steady 1.4°C limit.
